decode_direction: C4 '=' B*C ridge probe (the decodable product direction)

verdict_emit.label: NO_CAUSAL_HANDLE
verdict_emit.reason: the FULL residual swap at the '=' site moves the output by only 0.000 (|effect_full| < 0.5): there is no answer-effective causal effect at the site to apportion. The '=' site is causally dormant as a whole (the decodable product is re-derived from the operands; Stolfo) — a stronger dormancy statement than a dormant direction.

verdict_logprob.label: NO_CAUSAL_HANDLE
verdict_logprob.reason: the FULL residual swap at the '=' site moves the output by only 0.593 (|effect_full| < 1.0): there is no answer-effective causal effect at the site to apportion. The '=' site is causally dormant as a whole (the decodable product is re-derived from the operands; Stolfo) — a stronger dormancy statement than a dormant direction.

note: Causal-share Makelov certification: apportion the full-residual swap's answer-effective effect between the decode direction w-hat and its orthogonal complement. Primary metric = greedy emit-P'; effect_floor guards against certifying when the swap itself is inert (-> NO_CAUSAL_HANDLE, the whole site dormant). mean_w_frac_geometry is the magnitude share of the swap along w-hat (descriptive); the CAUSAL share is effect_wonly/effect_full.
